conflicts.description: Chapter 8 identifies Jin-seo Park's brother Jun-ho as a triathlete killed in a cycling-stage cascade failure, while chapter 12 compresses the same death into a 1500m race.
conflicts.canonical_value: Jun-ho Park died in 2034 in a triathlon cascade failure during the cycling stage.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 8 carries the fully embedded backstory with sport, event stage, crash mechanics, and aftermath; chapter 12 compresses the anecdote into later drift. The context pack only confirms the 2034 brother-death beat, so it does not outweigh chapter_08's more causally anchored version.
